zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Burgh於1328年2月5日出生在英國坎布利其爾布勒 格林時，他的父親Thomas de Burgh38歲，母親Margaret de Waldegrave27歲。他於1355年與Lady Catherine Engaine在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾斯托福 姆 吉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1393年8月在英國坎布利其爾格亞特 格林享年65歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾布勒 格林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Burgh于1328年2月5日出生在英国坎布利其爾布勒 格林时，他的父亲Thomas de Burgh38岁，母亲Margaret de Waldegrave27岁。他于1355年与Lady Catherine Engaine在英国英格兰坎布利其爾斯托福 姆 吉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1393年8月在英国坎布利其爾格亞特 格林享年65岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾布勒 格林。

nameMeanings.name: Burgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

variants.name: Bury
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.

variants.name: Brough
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various English places called Brough or Burgh. See   Burgh  .
Scottish: habitational name from Brough in Harray (Orkney).
Americanized form of German   Brauch   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Burgh was born on 5 February 1328, in Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Thomas de Burgh, was 38 and his mother, Margaret de Waldegrave, was 27. He married Lady Catherine Engaine in 1355, in Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in August 1393, in Great Green, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, England.

Il a épousé Lady Catherine Engaine en 1355, à Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en août 1393, à Great Green, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

Er hat 1355 in Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Catherine Engaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: John de Burghが1328年2月5日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアブロウ グレンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Burghは38歳，母Margaret de Waldegraveは27歳であった。1355年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアストウ クウム クイでLady Catherine Engaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1393年8月にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアグレアト グレンで65歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアブロウ グレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Burgh(이)가 1328년 2월 5일 영국 캄브리지실르 버루그h 그린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Burgh(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Waldegrave(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 스타우 c 크이에서 Lady Catherine Engaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1393년 8월 영국 캄브리지실르 그리트 그린에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 버루그h 그린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Burgh nasceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1328, em Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Burgh, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Waldegrave, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine Engaine em 1355, em Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1393, em Great Green, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Burgh родился 5 февраля 1328 г. в местности бурроую грин, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Burgh было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Waldegrave, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine Engaine в 1355 г. в местности стоу кум куи, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер август 1393 г. в местности грит грин, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности бурроую грин, камбриджешир, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Catherine Engaine en 1355, en Stow cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1393, en Great Green, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Burrough Green, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
